title: Ubiquiti UDR7, UniFi Dream Router 7
description: The UniFi Dream Router 7 from Ubiquiti is an all-in-one solution for homes and small offices. This powerful device with a quad-core CPU and 3 GB RAM , combining a router, WiFi 7 access point, and a 3-port 2.5G switch with 802.3af PoE support on one port. For connectivity, it includes a 2.5G WAN port and a 10G SFP+ WAN port. The router comes pre-installed with UniFi Network, Protect, Access, and Talk applications and features a microSD slot for storing camera recordings (64GB SD card included).… Tri-Band WiFi 7 AP with support for 802.11a/b/g/n/ac/ac/ax/be 5.7 Gbps (6GHz) + 2.9 Gbps (5GHz) + 688 Mbps (2.4GHz) (1) 10G SFP+ WAN + (1) 2.5G WAN + (3) 2.5G LAN â 1 port with PoE-Out (802.3af) PoE budget 15.4W MicroSD card slot for UniFi Protect recordings (64GB SD card included) 0.96" LCD color display for real-time network traffic monitoring Pre-installed UniFi applications: Network, Protect, Access, Talk, Connect Device 64GB MicroSD card Power cable MicroSD card eject tool
